name: Coarse-to-fine Framework for Generative MEF via Implicit Neural Representation

description: arXiv:2607.17611v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multi-exposure fusion (MEF) expands the luminance range beyond what a single exposure can capture. Combining images taken at different exposure levels requires handling geometric differences while naturally merging their complementary brightness information. It often demands generative completion where details are missing. Diffusion-based genera...
author: Sangmin Han, Jinho Kim, Jinwoo Kim, Dongyoung Kim, Seon Joo Kim
